data.body: Scope: Establish a clear separation between raw assets (~/Documents/Artifacts/) and production-ready images (in-repo under public/). Raw/archive materials stay outside the repo. Processed images that appear on the site live in public/ organized by page/project with a consistent naming convention. Need to: (1) define naming convention for production images, (2) clean up public/images/ structure (e.g. 'home page' dir with spaces, mixed organization), (3) ensure public/work/<discipline>/<project>/ pattern is consistent, (4) document the convention so future content follows it.

Naming conventions finalized. Production: <project>.<process>.<n>.ext (process=riso|raw). Raw source (outside repo): <project>/<stage>.<n>.ext (stage=reference|development|final). Studio desk archive: <date>.<type>.<tag>.<project?>.<size>.ext — deferred to ASMV-79. Production images renamed on feature/asmv-78-file-management-reorg branch.
